name: ng-web-preview
title: Web Preview (Angular)
description: Sandboxed browser preview for AI-generated sites. WebPreviewNavigation has back/forward/refresh, WebPreviewUrl is a navigable input, WebPreviewBody renders a sanitized iframe with the current URL, and WebPreviewConsole shows console logs below. Mirrors React WebPreview from @gremorie/rx-artifacts.

usage.whenToUse: TBD - document when to use ng-web-preview.
usage.whenNotToUse: TBD - document when to reach for something else.
